label: PASS
rationale: Observed LockingInfo.LogicalBlockSize is 4096 and observed MBR Table Rows is 134217728 bytes, so the active MBR shadow covers only the LBAs mapping to those bytes; LBA 40000 is outside that range and may return the prior user-data pattern AB.

label: FAIL
rationale: With the same observed 4096-byte logical blocks and 128 MB MBR table, LBA 40000 is outside the active MBR shadow range. Returning an MBR-pattern result instead of the prior user-data pattern AB is not supported by the cited shadowing rule.

label: PASS
rationale: Observed LogicalBlockSize is 512 and observed MBR Table Rows is 268435456 bytes, placing LBA 300000 inside the active MBR shadow range. Since the MBR byte table was set to pattern B0 before enabling shadowing, the read returning B0 is compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: LBA 300000 maps within the observed 268435456-byte MBR table when LogicalBlockSize is 512 and MBR shadowing is active. The cited rules require such LBA requests to be fulfilled from the MBR table, not from prior user data AA.
